title: Beyond the Safezone
description: A Backrooms-inspired horror modpack built around Minecraft Found Footage, designed for immersive exploration, tension, and live stream events.
body:
# 📼 Beyond the Safe Zone

**A Found Footage Backrooms Experience**

**Beyond the Safe Zone** is a horror-focused Minecraft modpack inspired by the unsettling atmosphere of the _Backrooms_ and classic _found footage_ horror.
The modpack is designed to create tension, isolation, and immersion while exploring endless yellow corridors where something is always watching.

## 🟨 Core Mod – Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage

This modpack is built around **Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage** by **SpacePotato**, which recreates the iconic Backrooms aesthetic using VHS-style visuals, analog horror effects, and disturbing ambience.

🔧 **Official GitHub Wiki (Gameplay, Mechanics & Info):**
https://github.com/SpacePotatoee/MinecraftFoundFootage/wiki

🎬 **Official Video by the Mod Author:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XnO1GAlR3qo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

All credit for the Backrooms Found Footage mod, concept, and implementation goes to SpacePotato.

## 🎧 Immersive Features
- **Proximity voice chat** for realistic communication and tension
- **Found footage VHS effects** and atmospheric visuals
- **Fabric-based setup** for performance and stability
- **Essential Mod** for multiplayer quality-of-life features
  
## 🔊 Important Notice – Simple Voice Chat

⚠️ **Simple Voice Chat is intentionally locked to version 2.5.36**

This specific version is required to **avoid compatibility issues with Essential Mod**.
Updating Simple Voice Chat beyond **2.5.36** may cause instability or connection problems.

Please **do not update this mod** unless compatibility is confirmed.

## 📦 Included Mods (Overview)
- Backrooms Found Footage (by SpacePotato)
- Simple Voice Chat (v2.5.36 – locked)
- Essential Mod
- Fabric API
- GeckoLib
- Collective
- Crash Assistant
- Mod Menu
- Simple Menu
- Lexiconfig

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

This modpack is intended for **horror gameplay** and may include:

- Psychological tension
- Dark environments
- Sudden visual/audio effects

Recommended to play with **headphones and low brightness** for the best experience.
